description: A farmer in a regulated water basin needs to track their water usage to ensure they do not exceed their annual allocation.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the farm's annual water allocation from the regional water board database.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the farm has an allocation of 500 acre-feet.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the cumulative water usage for the farm for the current year from flow meters.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the farm has used 450 acre-feet to date.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the remaining water allocation and send a notification to the farmer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent notifies the farmer that they have 50 acre-feet of water remaining for the year.
